# Skaylon

> Skaylon is a premium digital product studio and custom software development company. Acting as a strategic product partner, Skaylon specializes in intentional design, strategic engineering, and founder-led execution for startups and established enterprises.

## Business Context & Location

- **Entity Type**: MSME Registered Entity (Udyam KL-05-0037475)
- **Base Location**: Kasaragod, Kerala, India
- **Geographic Scope**: Serving businesses across India and globally
- **Operating Hours**: 9:30 AM – 6:30 PM IST
- **Primary Contact**: skaylon.in@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://skaylon.com

## Core Capabilities & Services

- **Website Development**: High-performance, search-optimized websites built with static site generation for sub-second speeds.
  - [Website Development Details](https://skaylon.com/services/website-development)
- **Web Application Development**: Scalable, security-first browser-based software and dashboard applications powered by React and Node.js.
  - [Web Application Development Details](https://skaylon.com/services/web-application-development)
- **Mobile App Development**: Cross-platform iOS and Android apps engineered with Google's Flutter framework.
  - [Mobile App Development Details](https://skaylon.com/services/mobile-app-development)
- **Custom Software Development**: Bespoke internal tools, ERPs, workflow automations, and startup MVP products.
  - [Custom Software Development Details](https://skaylon.com/services/custom-software-development)
- **UI/UX Design**: Intentional visual interfaces, interactive prototypes, and Figma design systems built for clean developer handoff.
  - [UI/UX Design Details](https://skaylon.com/services/ui-ux-design)

## Featured Case Studies

- **Navora**: Custom global logistics and supply chain digital flagship.
  - [Navora Case Study](https://skaylon.com/proof/navora-global-ltd)
- **ManifestOS**: Lightweight operational desktop-grade system.
  - [ManifestOS Case Study](https://skaylon.com/proof/manifestos)
- **TikiTak**: Real-time board gaming arena and multiplayer lobby system.
  - [TikiTak Case Study](https://skaylon.com/proof/tikitak-board-arena)
